product_name: Hot Wheels Creative Maker Kitz - Custom Racer Duel Pack

bullets: GET READY TO RACE - These custom kit vehicles are tough and fast! Build the vehicles from the pop out parts, pull back and watch them fly over the customisable stunt ramp provided!
DOUBLE THE FUN - This twin pack features two of the most iconic Hot Wheels vehicles - Roger Dodger and Super Van - making it a great gift for any young creative car fans!
CUSTOMISABLE - Decorate the iconic vehicles to make them your own with the five Hot Wheels coloured marker pens included with this creative kit!

EASY TO BUILD - This custom kit is easy to build requiring no glue or scissors making it a safe and fun activity for children to do independently or with an adult. It is also recognised as having some STEM learning benefits!
ECO FRIENDLY - With the car body made entirely from recyclable material and the packaging doubling up as a stunt ramp that you can also decorate, this is a great eco friendly toy!
content.description: Maker Kitz are the Hot Wheels™ cars YOU build - pop out the pre-cut plastic panels and assemble the tough snap-fit parts! Add power with turbo pull-back motors - then use the pens included to create YOUR unique custom design! The assembled car is tough enough to race, even perform jumps using the card launch ramp provided! Build, Race & Collect Hot Wheels™ Maker Kitz!

attributes.whats_in_box: 1 x Car Body Panel Kit, 1 x Van Body Panel Kit, 4 x Sets of Wheels with Pull Back Motor, 5 x Coloured Pens, 1 x Cardboard Stunt Ramp, 2 x Instruction Manuals

compliance.choking_hazard: Yes - Small Parts; Warning label on product packaging.
